app.title: JobScout24 Copilot
app.subtitle: Build and maintain your candidate profile in chat.
app.heroTitle: Be at the heart of the swiss job market
app.heroSubtitle: The complete inventory of Swiss jobs ads in one place - structured, searchable and kept up to date, so you can scan the whole market in minutes instead of trawling a dozen sites.
app.recruiterTitle: Your are a recruiter looking to hire someone ?

auth.signupSuccess: Account created. Check verification token in console email logs.
auth.signupEmailExists: An account with this email already exists.

profile.chatPromptExample: Use a job-profile message like: primary role: Senior QA Engineer
profile.chatPromptLabel: Tell the assistant what should change
profile.chatConfirmationRequired: Change not applied. Explicit confirmation is required.
profile.summaryHeadlineNote: These fields can also be filled automatically by the Career Guide agent.
profile.summaryHeadlinePlaceholder: e.g. Senior Product Designer focused on growth
profile.summaryValuePropositionPlaceholder: One short statement on what you consistently deliver
profile.summaryTargetRolesPlaceholder: e.g. Product Manager, Senior Product Manager
profile.summaryRelocationWillingnessPlaceholder: e.g. Open to relocation within Switzerland
profile.completionComplete: Your profile meets the minimal completion gate.
profile.completionIncomplete: Your profile is still missing key fields.

onboarding.title: Continue your onboarding
onboarding.lead: Answer a few quick questions and we will prepare your profile step by step.
onboarding.intro: Great to meet you 🙂 I will guide you step-by-step and save each confirmed answer to your profile right away.
onboarding.uploadSuccess: CV uploaded and onboarding state updated.
onboarding.uploadFailed: Unable to process the CV right now.
onboarding.assistantUnavailable: Assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
onboarding.saveFailed: I could not save that answer. Please try again.
onboarding.blockedFallback: I cannot share that. Let us continue with your profile.
onboarding.answerFailed: I could not answer that right now. Please try again.
onboarding.fileReadFailed: I could not read this file. Please try a PDF or plain .txt file.
onboarding.cvSaveFailed: CV parsed but I could not save the extracted information. Please try again.
onboarding.cvAnalyzed: Your CV has been analyzed and your profile has been filled with the information I could confidently detect. I will now ask the remaining preference questions needed to complete your profile.
onboarding.cvUploadedNoFacts: CV uploaded. I could not extract structured fields automatically - let us continue filling in your profile together.
onboarding.completeNoCv: Excellent! 🎉 Your core profile is taking shape! Next, let's upload your CV so I can automatically extract your experience and fill in the remaining details. This saves you tons of time! ⚡
onboarding.placeholderComplete: Profile complete. You can still type changes anytime.
onboarding.offTrackNudge: That does not look like an answer to this question. Let us stay on track:

fullName.prompt: What name should we use on your profile? 😊
fullName.reason: Needed to identify the candidate profile.
fullName.acknowledgment: Perfect! 😊 I've saved {name} to your profile!

primaryRole.prompt: Great — should we lock in {targetRole} as your target role? 🎯
primaryRole.reason: Confirms the role the rest of onboarding should optimize for.
primaryRole.acknowledgment: Awesome! 🎯✨ I've locked in {targetRole} as your target role. Everything I suggest from here on will be tailored to help you land this role! 🚀

preferredLocation.prompt: Where in the world are you looking to work? 🌍
preferredLocation.reason: Location is a core matching signal.
preferredLocation.acknowledgment: Perfect! 📍 I've saved {location} as your location preference. This helps me filter job matches so we only focus on opportunities that actually fit your mobility! 🚀✨

workPermitStatus.prompt: What's your work permit status? 🇨🇭 (This helps me avoid wasting your time on roles you're not eligible for!)
workPermitStatus.acknowledgment: Awesome! 🇨🇭 I've saved your work permit status to your profile. This means I can confidently match you with opportunities where you're legally eligible to work! 🎉

contractPreference.prompt: What type of work setup works best for you? 💼 (Permanent, contract, freelance, or open to anything?)
contractPreference.acknowledgment: Got it! 💼✨ I've saved that to your profile. This helps me find roles that actually fit your lifestyle and career goals! 🎯

redirects.scopeGuard: I cannot help with that. Let us continue with your profile.
redirects.scopeGuardReason: The message is outside job-search onboarding scope.
redirects.completeReason: Your profile is complete and ready.

errors.invalidPayload: Invalid request. Please check your input.
errors.notStarted: Onboarding not started. Please upload a CV first.

guidance.pageSubtitle: Personalised coaching based on your saved profile 🎯
guidance.loading: Analysing your profile and generating personalised guidance…
guidance.errorIncomplete: Could not load guidance right now. Make sure your profile has at least a target role and location filled in, then try again.

mockInterview.pageSubtitle: Practice interviews with AI to prepare for real opportunities
mockInterview.validationError: Please select interview type and enter target role

skillDevelopment.pageSubtitle: Close your skill gaps with curated learning resources
skillDevelopment.noResources: No resources found for this skill

readiness.pageSubtitle: See how ready you are for different roles and what you need to work on

sourcing.title: Recruiter sourcing
sourcing.subtitle: Upload a recruiter-needs JSON to rank every candidate and surface the top 3 fits.
sourcing.uploadHint: Drop or choose a .json file describing the role.
sourcing.replaceHint: Choose another .json file to re-run matching.
sourcing.parseError: That file isn't valid JSON. Check the format and try again.
sourcing.fallbackNote: Deterministic ranking (no AI narrative — ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set).
